title: 2000 Lei (New Millennium - Total Solar Eclipse)

obverse.description: The main image is the simplified Solar System; in the down right corner, the window with the metameric filter; on the upper part: Romania's Coat of Arms, the transparent window, name of the issuing central bank "BANCA NAŢIONALĂ A ROMÂNIEI" and "BNR" logo; on the lower part: face value in figures and letters "2.000 lei DOUA MII" and above, the year of issue "1999"; on the left, placed vertically, authorized signatures of the Governor and the Chief Cashier, and the simplifed image of the Sun; face value "DOUA MII 2.000" is placed vertically, on the right.
obverse.lettering:
BANCA NATIONALA A ROMANIEI
ECLIPSA TOTALA DE SOARE 11 AUGUST 1999
2.000 DOUA MII
GUVERNATOR CASIER CENTRAL
1999
2.000 lei DOUA MII
obverse.lettering_translation:
National Bank of Romania
Total Solar Eclipse August 11, 1999
2000 Two Thousand
Gobernador   Central Cashier

reverse.description: In the middle, the map of Romania coloured in red, yellow and blue; on the map, the area and the cities where the eclipse was the most visible; on the upper part, face value "2.000" vertical and horizontal, name of the central bank "BANCA NAŢIONALĂ A ROMÂNIEI" and "BNR" logo; under the name of the central bank, the transparent window; on the lower part, on the left, the window with metameric filter; on the right: face value in letters and figures "DOUA MII lei 2.000"; on the right, above the face value, the text "FALSIFICAREA ACESTOR BILETE SE PEDEPSESTE CONFORM LEGILOR" (forgery is punished according to the law) placed horizontally; series and numbers of the banknote are printed in letters and figures with black and red ink, as follows: fonts of the same height printed vertically on the left side with black ink and fonts of ascending height on the right side with red ink.
reverse.lettering:
2.000 BANCA NATIONALA A ROMANIEI
ARAD TIMISOARA LUGOJ HUNEDOARA PETROSANI TARGU JIU RAMNICU-VALCEA PITESTI DRAGASANI TARGOVISTE PLOIESTI BUCURESTI 
FALSIFICAREA ACESTOR BILETE SE PEDEPSESTE CONFORM LEGILOR
DOUA MII lei 2.000
reverse.lettering_translation:
2000 National Bank of Romania
ARAD TIMISOARA LUGOJ HUNEDOARA PETROSANI TARGU JIU RAMNICU-VALCEA PITESTI DRAGASANI TARGOVISTE PLOIESTI BUCURESTI (Romanian cities)
COUNTERFEITING OF THESE TICKETS IS PUNISHED ACCORDING TO THE LAWS
Two thousand Lei 2000

commemorated_topic: Total Eclipse of the Sun (August 11, 1999) and Entering the New Millennium
